info.title: DeveSolToSharp
info.description: This tool can be installed and used to generate C# files (for Nethereum) to interact with Solidity contracts on the blockchain

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
The namespace to generate the objects in (Default: It
tries to be smart)

options.name: --inputdir
options.description:
The directory to find the .abi files in (Default:
currentdirectory)

options.name: --outputdir
options.description:
The directory to generate the C# files in (Default:
inputdirectory\DeveSolToSharp\)
